content.json:
# 🏥 Azure Landing Zone Health Dashboard

Real-time health monitoring and operational insights for your ALZ deployment.

content.query:
resources
| where resourceGroup == '{ResourceGroup}'
| summarize Total=count(), Healthy=countif(provisioningState == 'Succeeded'), Failed=countif(provisioningState == 'Failed')
| project Total, Healthy, Failed, HealthPercentage=round((Healthy*100)/Total)
content.title: Resource Deployment Status

content.query:
policyresources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| summarize Total=count(), Compliant=countif(properties.complianceState == 'Compliant'), NonCompliant=countif(properties.complianceState == 'NonCompliant')
| project Total, Compliant, NonCompliant, CompliancePercentage=round((Compliant*100)/Total)
content.title: Policy Compliance Overview

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == 'AZUREFIREWALLS'
| where MetricName == 'Throughput'
| summarize AvgThroughput=avg(Average), MaxThroughput=max(Maximum)
| project AvgThroughput=round(AvgThroughput), MaxThroughput=round(MaxThroughput)
content.title: Firewall Throughput

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where ResourceProvider == 'Microsoft.Insights/alertsmanagement'
| where OperationName contains 'Alert'
| top 10 by TimeGenerated desc
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Level, Properties
content.title: Recent Alerts (Last 24h)

content.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize ComputerCount=dcount(Computer), IngestionRate=count()
| project 'Computers Reporting'=ComputerCount, 'Records Ingested'=IngestionRate
content.title: Log Analytics Ingestion
